creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:

Log:
  x11/lumina: Update to 1.6.0 and Take MAINTAINER'ship

    - Update to 1.6.0
    - Take MAINTAINER'ship
    - Add missing USE_GL
    - Fix order of options in Makefiles
